title: ZenTask – Productivity Dashboard
description: A modern productivity dashboard with task management, theme toggle, pomodoro timer, and dynamic wallpapers based on time.

title: Notes CRUD App
description: Full-stack notes application with create, read, update and delete functionality using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.

title: E-Commerce Platform

title: Weather App
description: A real-time weather application that fetches data from an API and displays temperature, humidity, and wind speed.
